prompt: 我想给我的项目加个通知系统，用户能收到各种提醒
assertions: The response diagnoses the request as ambiguous (problem unclear) rather than immediately proposing a solution
The response asks at most one focused clarifying question rather than dumping a checklist
The response surfaces at least one assumption or blind spot (e.g., delivery channel, trigger conditions, who receives notifications)
The response does NOT jump to architecture or implementation choices before clarifying goals
